use_cases: Displaying product galleries with continuous 3D animated scrolling effect
Showcasing portfolio or work samples in an engaging marquee layout
Creating animated hero section backdrops for websites
Displaying client logos or partner logos with continuous motion
Building testimonial image carousels with hover interactions
ai_summary: A 3D marquee component that arranges images in a CSS 3D transformed grid layout with continuous vertical scrolling animations. Features alternating column animations, hover lift effects on images, and responsive scaling. Uses motion/react for smooth animations and GPU-accelerated 3D transforms for an immersive visual display experience.
